explainers.title: From SEO to Agent-Led Growth
explainers.description: AI agents now browse the internet on behalf of humans, visiting 65+ pages per query. Marketing will never be the same.

explainers.title: India's Energy Ambitions vs Reality
explainers.description: 8,540 energy projects analyzed. The gap between announcing capacity and actually building it is enormous -- and 2030 targets are in trouble.

explainers.title: The Machine That Builds Danger
explainers.description: How federal funding, car-centric engineering, and accounting tricks create cities that look prosperous but are slowly bankrupting themselves -- and killing people along the way.

explainers.title: The Loopy Era of AI
explainers.description: Andrej Karpathy on code agents, AutoResearch, and what happens when AI starts improving itself -- while humans try to keep up

explainers.title: Blockchain, Demystified
explainers.description: How a shared notebook that nobody controls and nobody can erase actually works -- from mining to wallets to why it matters.
